data.body: PHASE 2 START (identity subtree). User confirmed I have authenticated AWS CLI (acct 896586841071, us-east-1) + GH CLI (JoeOakhartNava; repo/workflow/admin:public_key scopes) and authorized me to generate+store the bot key myself. Verified: can list GH Actions secrets on navapbc/rebar (admin) + read/write /rebar/prod SSM params. Order: bffe first (provision key), then subtree in dep order (user chose no parallel pre-work). New branch epic-cummy-identity from origin/main (config-prune landed). Kicking off 297d + bffe plan-reviews.
